TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == "kudih ukak 13" "kamu nu Zipun„āī„Éę„āī13, kamu nu Ing, Golgo 13", u ci Ci-ten-lung-bu ku misanga'ay tu baluhay a mangga nu Zipun, tataangangan u matinengay misamamaw nu mipatayay Golgo 13. 1968 a mihca 11 a bulad malingatu i adidi'ay a piazihan tu cudad "Big Comic" lalid sa tahkal i zasya, katukuh tu ayza malakui' tu 50 a mihcaan malaliday tu, katukuh 2023 a mihca 10 a bulad mapatahkalay tu 212 ku cudad. "ť™∑ťęŹ13"(śó•Ť™ě:„āī„Éę„āī13,ŤčĪŤ™ě:Golgo 13), Golgo 13.1968ŚĻī11śúąŤĶ∑Śú®ŚįŹŚ≠łť§®"Big Comic" . nilaculan uyni cudad nu Zipun a mangga lalid tahkal i likisi saka sepat nu tanayaay a nisulitan. katukuh 2017 a mihcaan uyni cudad pulung a nipatahkalan macaliway tu tusa a wawalen a cudadan. katukuh 2021 a mihca 3 a bulad, macaliway ku "u-lung kinsasiw" malepunay 200 a cudadan ahebetay tu cin-s kilu nu kitakit "nipatahkal a cudad sayadahay u bangga cacay". 2021 a mihca 7 a bulad malingatu i "Big Comic micunus patahkal" saayaway tahkal ku baluhay a nisanga'an tu "cung-ci-cešļļ„ÉĽ„Éá„ā§„ÉĖ" Golgo 13, zuma ngangan Ti-ketung-syang "Duke Togo", Tung-ya a tademaw, u matinengay misamamaw nu mipatayay i kitakit, angangan i Ameylika mikawaw. kanahatu singangan i kitakit, nika tatenga'ay a ngangan, kaliyuhan ku mihcaan, u nisumadan a kuwang M16.. u banggu Golgo 13 lalekalan makay ke-ke-ta "Golgotha", u pipacekan ci Ye-suan. apuyu' ku bukes, talakaw ku uzip, sisibilu tu lemini'aay. u matinengan mikuwang, u laed natusa kung-li ku batad ku patucekan a mukuwa ng, na i 0.2 beti' ku laed mapatay tu tuluay a tademaw. cac ay a mihcaan nayi' ku icelang, namahiza mapabaliw u siimelangay tu ci-pa-s pulung a imelang. kawili atu kawanan malecad matama ku palucekan, lalid tuni kamu tusa malebut ku nipipatay tu tademaw. tezep sa caay pisakamu, caay henay pimecme, caay patazikuzan tu tademaw. kanahatu makatakatal, nika malepun ku nipapikawawan nu tawki, anu mapatay tu ku tawki mahizatu, caay ku pacaba sanay musakamu. zuma hinadihi atu palipahakay ku wayway. "kudih ukak 13" u tatenga'ay a paazihan nu kitakit, pakayniay i likisi, can-ce cin-ci, katalawan a nizateng, masakaputay nu mungangaway, tahak a labades. 1971 a mihca 4 a bulad katukuh 7 a bulad TBS a demiad tu 23:30 - 23:40 a laed patahkal. saayaway u TV lalid sanay patahkal caay kalecad tu ayzaay, u hekal "misaungayay a zuga" aazihan patatungus tu ngiha nu tademaw atu kapah nu ngiha "mahizaay Hay-low a kaying" iza henay itawyaay nu patatungusay tu ngiha a tatayna itawya hatu u singanganay nu hayu atu mudadiway. nika zikuz nu mahicahica ku musaungayay a ziga, musaungayay a zuga i zasi caay hena kasulit ku ku mahiniay a kawaw. mikining tu 40 a mihcaan a nisulitan, namahiza u saayaway a "musaungayay a ziga" nu TV lalid sanay patahkal. 2008 a mihcaan 4 a bulad 11 a demiad paazih katukuh tu zuma a mihcaan tu 2009 a mihca 3 a bulad 27 a demiad pahezek tu paazih. uyza u "tengitengil u canan a kawawan", amana pitize i zikuzan aku. kadimel tu uzip a kamu" mala u kudih ukak 13 a tademaw situngusay tu sasakamuan tu sapisakamu. iza hanay ku kudih ukakay a sapatungus tu ngiha ci Kun-kong a tademaw. ayaway a ziday, labu nu kamu hatu nu kanatalal a kawaw, angangan uynian a kamu, nika kamu tu kitizaan u canan a kanatalan atu tukay nika caay paheci. izaw henay kayadahen tu nisanga'an tu musaungayay a zuga amacelak. DVD makay 2008 a mihca 11 a bulad malingtu pacakay, pulung hamin13 a lutlut. .DVDŚĺě2008ŚĻī11śúąťĖčŚßčŤ≤©ŚĒģ,ŚÖĪŚÖ®13Ść∑. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == "kudińß ukak **" "kamu nu zipun*****, kamu nu iŇč, gor~…ĺgo **", u ¶i ¶i-t…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč-bu ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a maŇčga nu zipun, tataaŇčaŇčan u matin…ôŇčaj misamamaw nu mipatajaj gor~…ĺgo **. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu i adidi Ē~ °aj a piazińßan tu ¶udad "big ¶omi ¶" r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa tańßkar~…ĺ i zasja, katukuńß tu ajza mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mapatańßkar~…ĺaj tu *** ku ¶udad. "****"(**:*****,**:gor~…ĺgo **), gor~…ĺgo **.*************"big ¶omi ¶" . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ujni ¶udad nu zipun a maŇčga r~…ĺar~…ĺid tańßkar~…ĺ i r~…ĺikisi saka s…ôpat nu tanajaaj a nisur~…ĺitan. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ujni ¶udad pur~…ĺuŇč a nipatańßkar~…ĺan ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu tusa a wawar~…ĺ…ôn a ¶udadan. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku "u-r~…ĺuŇč kinsasiw" mar~…ĺ…ôpunaj *** a ¶udadan ańß…ôb…ôtaj tu ¶in-s kir~…ĺu nu kitakit "nipatańßkar~…ĺ a ¶udad sajadańßaj u baŇčga ¶a ¶aj". **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu i "big ¶omi ¶ mi ¶unus patańßkar~…ĺ" saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu " ¶uŇč- ¶i- ¶…ô*****" gor~…ĺgo **, zuma ŇčaŇčan ti-k…ôtuŇč-sjaŇč "duk…ô togo", tuŇč-ja a tad…ômaw, u matin…ôŇčaj misamamaw nu mipatajaj i kitakit, aŇčaŇčan i am…ôr~…ĺika mikawaw. kanańßatu siŇčaŇčan i kitakit, nika tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a ŇčaŇčan, kar~…ĺijuńßan ku mińß ¶aan, u nisumadan a kuwaŇč m**.. u baŇčgu gor~…ĺgo ** r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan makaj k…ô-k…ô-ta "gor~…ĺgotńßa", u pipa ¶…ôkan ¶i j…ô-suan. apuju Ē~ ° ku buk…ôs, tar~…ĺakaw ku uzip, sisibir~…ĺu tu r~…ĺ…ômini Ē~ °aaj. u matin…ôŇčan mikuwaŇč, u r~…ĺa…ôd natusa kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku batad ku patu ¶…ôkan a mukuwa Ňč, na i *.* b…ôti Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺa…ôd mapataj tu tur~…ĺuaj a tad…ômaw. ¶a ¶ aj a mińß ¶aan naji Ē~ ° ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, namańßiza mapabar~…ĺiw u siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu ¶i-pa-s pur~…ĺuŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. kawir~…ĺi atu kawanan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad matama ku par~…ĺu ¶…ôkan, r~…ĺar~…ĺid tuni kamu tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku nipipataj tu tad…ômaw. t…ôz…ôp sa ¶aaj pisakamu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pim…ô ¶m…ô, ¶aaj patazikuzan tu tad…ômaw. kanańßatu makatakatar~…ĺ, nika mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku nipapikawawan nu tawki, anu mapataj tu ku tawki mańßizatu, ¶aaj ku pa ¶aba sanaj musakamu. zuma ńßinadińßi atu par~…ĺipańßakaj ku wajwaj. "kudińß ukak **" u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a paazińßan nu kitakit, pakajniaj i r~…ĺikisi, ¶an- ¶…ô ¶in- ¶i, katar~…ĺawan a nizat…ôŇč, masakaputaj nu muŇčaŇčawaj, tańßak a r~…ĺabad…ôs. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad tbs a d…ômiad tu **:** - **:** a r~…ĺa…ôd patańßkar~…ĺ. saajawaj u t* r~…ĺar~…ĺid sanaj patańßkar~…ĺ ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ajzaaj, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ "misauŇčajaj a zuga" aazińßan patatuŇčus tu Ňčińßa nu tad…ômaw atu kapańß nu Ňčińßa "mańßizaaj ńßaj-r~…ĺow a kajiŇč" iza ńß…ônaj itawjaaj nu patatuŇčusaj tu Ňčińßa a tatajna itawja ńßatu u siŇčaŇčanaj nu ńßaju atu mudadiwaj. nika zikuz nu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku musauŇčajaj a ziga, musauŇčajaj a zuga i zasi ¶aaj ńß…ôna kasur~…ĺit ku ku mańßiniaj a kawaw. mikiniŇč tu ** a mińß ¶aan a nisur~…ĺitan, namańßiza u saajawaj a "musauŇčajaj a ziga" nu t* r~…ĺar~…ĺid sanaj patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad paazińß katukuńß tu zuma a mińß ¶aan tu **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad pańß…ôz…ôk tu paazińß. ujza u "t…ôŇčit…ôŇčir~…ĺ u ¶anan a kawawan", amana pitiz…ô i zikuzan aku. kadim…ôr~…ĺ tu uzip a kamu" mar~…ĺa u kudińß ukak ** a tad…ômaw situŇčusaj tu sasakamuan tu sapisakamu. iza ńßanaj ku kudińß ukakaj a sapatuŇčus tu Ňčińßa ¶i kun-koŇč a tad…ômaw. ajawaj a zidaj, r~…ĺabu nu kamu ńßatu nu kanatar~…ĺar~…ĺ a kawaw, aŇčaŇčan ujnian a kamu, nika kamu tu kitizaan u ¶anan a kanatar~…ĺan atu tukaj nika ¶aaj pańß…ô ¶i. izaw ńß…ônaj kajadańß…ôn tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu musauŇčajaj a zuga ama ¶…ôr~…ĺak. d*d makaj **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčtu pa ¶akaj, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßamin** a r~…ĺutr~…ĺut. .d*d*************,*****. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == "kudih ukak 13" "kamu nu Zipun„āī„Éę„āī13, kamu nu Ing, Golgo 13", u ci Ci-ten-lung-bu ku misanga'ay tu baluhay a mangga nu Zipun, tataangangan u matinengay misamamaw nu mipatayay Golgo 13. 1968 a mihca 11 a bulad malingatu i adidi'ay a piazihan tu cudad "Big Comic" lalid sa tahkal i zasya, katukuh tu ayza malakui' tu 50 a mihcaan malaliday tu, katukuh 2023 a mihca 10 a bulad mapatahkalay tu 212 ku cudad. "ť™∑ťęŹ13"(śó•Ť™ě:„āī„Éę„āī13,ŤčĪŤ™ě:Golgo 13), Golgo 13.1968ŚĻī11śúąŤĶ∑Śú®ŚįŹŚ≠łť§®"Big Comic" . nilaculan uyni cudad nu Zipun a mangga lalid tahkal i likisi saka sepat nu tanayaay a nisulitan. katukuh 2017 a mihcaan uyni cudad pulung a nipatahkalan macaliway tu tusa a wawalen a cudadan. katukuh 2021 a mihca 3 a bulad, macaliway ku "u-lung kinsasiw" malepunay 200 a cudadan ahebetay tu cin-s kilu nu kitakit "nipatahkal a cudad sayadahay u bangga cacay". 2021 a mihca 7 a bulad malingatu i "Big Comic micunus patahkal" saayaway tahkal ku baluhay a nisanga'an tu "cung-ci-cešļļ„ÉĽ„Éá„ā§„ÉĖ" Golgo 13, zuma ngangan Ti-ketung-syang "Duke Togo", Tung-ya a tademaw, u matinengay misamamaw nu mipatayay i kitakit, angangan i Ameylika mikawaw. kanahatu singangan i kitakit, nika tatenga'ay a ngangan, kaliyuhan ku mihcaan, u nisumadan a kuwang M16.. u banggu Golgo 13 lalekalan makay ke-ke-ta "Golgotha", u pipacekan ci Ye-suan. apuyu' ku bukes, talakaw ku uzip, sisibilu tu lemini'aay. u matinengan mikuwang, u laed natusa kung-li ku batad ku patucekan a mukuwa ng, na i 0.2 beti' ku laed mapatay tu tuluay a tademaw. cac ay a mihcaan nayi' ku icelang, namahiza mapabaliw u siimelangay tu ci-pa-s pulung a imelang. kawili atu kawanan malecad matama ku palucekan, lalid tuni kamu tusa malebut ku nipipatay tu tademaw. tezep sa caay pisakamu, caay henay pimecme, caay patazikuzan tu tademaw. kanahatu makatakatal, nika malepun ku nipapikawawan nu tawki, anu mapatay tu ku tawki mahizatu, caay ku pacaba sanay musakamu. zuma hinadihi atu palipahakay ku wayway. "kudih ukak 13" u tatenga'ay a paazihan nu kitakit, pakayniay i likisi, can-ce cin-ci, katalawan a nizateng, masakaputay nu mungangaway, tahak a labades. 1971 a mihca 4 a bulad katukuh 7 a bulad TBS a demiad tu 23:30 - 23:40 a laed patahkal. saayaway u TV lalid sanay patahkal caay kalecad tu ayzaay, u hekal "misaungayay a zuga" aazihan patatungus tu ngiha nu tademaw atu kapah nu ngiha "mahizaay Hay-low a kaying" iza henay itawyaay nu patatungusay tu ngiha a tatayna itawya hatu u singanganay nu hayu atu mudadiway. nika zikuz nu mahicahica ku musaungayay a ziga, musaungayay a zuga i zasi caay hena kasulit ku ku mahiniay a kawaw. mikining tu 40 a mihcaan a nisulitan, namahiza u saayaway a "musaungayay a ziga" nu TV lalid sanay patahkal. 2008 a mihcaan 4 a bulad 11 a demiad paazih katukuh tu zuma a mihcaan tu 2009 a mihca 3 a bulad 27 a demiad pahezek tu paazih. uyza u "tengitengil u canan a kawawan", amana pitize i zikuzan aku. kadimel tu uzip a kamu" mala u kudih ukak 13 a tademaw situngusay tu sasakamuan tu sapisakamu. iza hanay ku kudih ukakay a sapatungus tu ngiha ci Kun-kong a tademaw. ayaway a ziday, labu nu kamu hatu nu kanatalal a kawaw, angangan uynian a kamu, nika kamu tu kitizaan u canan a kanatalan atu tukay nika caay paheci. izaw henay kayadahen tu nisanga'an tu musaungayay a zuga amacelak. DVD makay 2008 a mihca 11 a bulad malingtu pacakay, pulung hamin13 a lutlut. .DVDŚĺě2008ŚĻī11śúąťĖčŚßčŤ≤©ŚĒģ,ŚÖĪŚÖ®13Ść∑. malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == "kudińß ukak **" "kamu nu zipun*****, kamu nu iŇč, gor~…ĺgo **", u ¶i ¶i-t…ôn-r~…ĺuŇč-bu ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a maŇčga nu zipun, tataaŇčaŇčan u matin…ôŇčaj misamamaw nu mipatajaj gor~…ĺgo **. **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu i adidi Ē~ °aj a piazińßan tu ¶udad "big ¶omi ¶" r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa tańßkar~…ĺ i zasja, katukuńß tu ajza mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° tu ** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺar~…ĺidaj tu, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mapatańßkar~…ĺaj tu *** ku ¶udad. "****"(**:*****,**:gor~…ĺgo **), gor~…ĺgo **.*************"big ¶omi ¶" . nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan ujni ¶udad nu zipun a maŇčga r~…ĺar~…ĺid tańßkar~…ĺ i r~…ĺikisi saka s…ôpat nu tanajaaj a nisur~…ĺitan. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan ujni ¶udad pur~…ĺuŇč a nipatańßkar~…ĺan ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu tusa a wawar~…ĺ…ôn a ¶udadan. katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj ku "u-r~…ĺuŇč kinsasiw" mar~…ĺ…ôpunaj *** a ¶udadan ańß…ôb…ôtaj tu ¶in-s kir~…ĺu nu kitakit "nipatańßkar~…ĺ a ¶udad sajadańßaj u baŇčga ¶a ¶aj". **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčatu i "big ¶omi ¶ mi ¶unus patańßkar~…ĺ" saajawaj tańßkar~…ĺ ku bar~…ĺuńßaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu " ¶uŇč- ¶i- ¶…ô*****" gor~…ĺgo **, zuma ŇčaŇčan ti-k…ôtuŇč-sjaŇč "duk…ô togo", tuŇč-ja a tad…ômaw, u matin…ôŇčaj misamamaw nu mipatajaj i kitakit, aŇčaŇčan i am…ôr~…ĺika mikawaw. kanańßatu siŇčaŇčan i kitakit, nika tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a ŇčaŇčan, kar~…ĺijuńßan ku mińß ¶aan, u nisumadan a kuwaŇč m**.. u baŇčgu gor~…ĺgo ** r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan makaj k…ô-k…ô-ta "gor~…ĺgotńßa", u pipa ¶…ôkan ¶i j…ô-suan. apuju Ē~ ° ku buk…ôs, tar~…ĺakaw ku uzip, sisibir~…ĺu tu r~…ĺ…ômini Ē~ °aaj. u matin…ôŇčan mikuwaŇč, u r~…ĺa…ôd natusa kuŇč-r~…ĺi ku batad ku patu ¶…ôkan a mukuwa Ňč, na i *.* b…ôti Ē~ ° ku r~…ĺa…ôd mapataj tu tur~…ĺuaj a tad…ômaw. ¶a ¶ aj a mińß ¶aan naji Ē~ ° ku i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč, namańßiza mapabar~…ĺiw u siim…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj tu ¶i-pa-s pur~…ĺuŇč a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. kawir~…ĺi atu kawanan mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad matama ku par~…ĺu ¶…ôkan, r~…ĺar~…ĺid tuni kamu tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut ku nipipataj tu tad…ômaw. t…ôz…ôp sa ¶aaj pisakamu, ¶aaj ńß…ônaj pim…ô ¶m…ô, ¶aaj patazikuzan tu tad…ômaw. kanańßatu makatakatar~…ĺ, nika mar~…ĺ…ôpun ku nipapikawawan nu tawki, anu mapataj tu ku tawki mańßizatu, ¶aaj ku pa ¶aba sanaj musakamu. zuma ńßinadińßi atu par~…ĺipańßakaj ku wajwaj. "kudińß ukak **" u tat…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a paazińßan nu kitakit, pakajniaj i r~…ĺikisi, ¶an- ¶…ô ¶in- ¶i, katar~…ĺawan a nizat…ôŇč, masakaputaj nu muŇčaŇčawaj, tańßak a r~…ĺabad…ôs. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad tbs a d…ômiad tu **:** - **:** a r~…ĺa…ôd patańßkar~…ĺ. saajawaj u t* r~…ĺar~…ĺid sanaj patańßkar~…ĺ ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ajzaaj, u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ "misauŇčajaj a zuga" aazińßan patatuŇčus tu Ňčińßa nu tad…ômaw atu kapańß nu Ňčińßa "mańßizaaj ńßaj-r~…ĺow a kajiŇč" iza ńß…ônaj itawjaaj nu patatuŇčusaj tu Ňčińßa a tatajna itawja ńßatu u siŇčaŇčanaj nu ńßaju atu mudadiwaj. nika zikuz nu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku musauŇčajaj a ziga, musauŇčajaj a zuga i zasi ¶aaj ńß…ôna kasur~…ĺit ku ku mańßiniaj a kawaw. mikiniŇč tu ** a mińß ¶aan a nisur~…ĺitan, namańßiza u saajawaj a "musauŇčajaj a ziga" nu t* r~…ĺar~…ĺid sanaj patańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad paazińß katukuńß tu zuma a mińß ¶aan tu **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad pańß…ôz…ôk tu paazińß. ujza u "t…ôŇčit…ôŇčir~…ĺ u ¶anan a kawawan", amana pitiz…ô i zikuzan aku. kadim…ôr~…ĺ tu uzip a kamu" mar~…ĺa u kudińß ukak ** a tad…ômaw situŇčusaj tu sasakamuan tu sapisakamu. iza ńßanaj ku kudińß ukakaj a sapatuŇčus tu Ňčińßa ¶i kun-koŇč a tad…ômaw. ajawaj a zidaj, r~…ĺabu nu kamu ńßatu nu kanatar~…ĺar~…ĺ a kawaw, aŇčaŇčan ujnian a kamu, nika kamu tu kitizaan u ¶anan a kanatar~…ĺan atu tukaj nika ¶aaj pańß…ô ¶i. izaw ńß…ônaj kajadańß…ôn tu nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu musauŇčajaj a zuga ama ¶…ôr~…ĺak. d*d makaj **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad mar~…ĺiŇčtu pa ¶akaj, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßamin** a r~…ĺutr~…ĺut. .d*d*************,*****. mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
